name: PCMFlowDevice
description: Device I/O helpers for PCMFlow. Provides M5SpeakerBufferedPlayer for M5Unified Speaker.playRaw() buffered playback with rotating PCM buffers, prebuffer/chunk profiles, retry handling, and application-side diagnostics. Transport and codec logic stay in PCMFlowUDP and codec sibling libraries.
keywords: audio, pcmflow, device, m5stack, m5unified, speaker, i2s, buffer
